summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHASE 30.1 Hypothesis Pool Engine API endpoints. All 12 test cases passed successfully, verifying pool formation, ranking algorithms, filtering thresholds, and pool statistics calculations.
passed_tests: Hypothesis Pool BTC endpoint - returns pool of competing hypotheses
Pool size limit - enforces maximum 5 hypotheses per pool
Ranking score sorting - hypotheses sorted by ranking_score descending
Pool confidence calculation - mean of top 3 hypotheses confidences
Pool reliability calculation - mean of all hypotheses reliabilities
Filtering thresholds - confidence > 0.30, reliability > 0.25, execution != UNFAVORABLE
Pool Summary endpoint - returns pool statistics and distributions
Pool History endpoint - returns pool history with proper structure
Pool Recompute endpoint - force recomputes pool with new data
top_hypothesis is first - top_hypothesis matches first hypothesis in pool
NO_EDGE fallback - handles empty pools with NO_EDGE fallback
